session.tool_result:
1→"""Linear pipelines for the land command. 2→ 3→Two pipelines bridge the shell script serialization boundary: 4→- Validation pipeline: runs in `erk land` CLI, gathers all state and confirmations 5→- Execution pipeline: runs in `erk exec land-execute`, performs mutations 6→ 7→Each step: (ErkContext, LandState) -> LandState | LandError 8→""" 9→ 10→import dataclasses 11→from collections.abc import Callable 12→from dataclasses import dataclass 13→from functools import cache 14→from pathlib import Path 15→ 16→import click 17→ 18→from erk.cli.commands.land_learn import _create_learn_pr_with_sessions 19→from erk.cli.commands.navigation_helpers import check_clean_working_tree 20→from erk.cli.commands.objective_helpers import get_objective_for_branch 21→from erk.cli.core import discover_repo_context 22→from erk.cli.ensure import Ensure 23→from erk.cli.ensure_ideal import EnsureIdeal 24→from erk.core.context import ErkContext 25→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import MergeError, PRDetails 26→from erk_shared.gateway.gt.cli import render_events 27→from erk_shared.gateway.gt.operations.land_pr import execute_land_pr 28→from erk_shared.gateway.gt.types import LandPrError 29→from erk_shared.output.output import user_output 30→from erk_shared.stack.validation import validate_parent_is_trunk
... [601 lines omitted] ...
71→class LandError: 72→ """Error result from a pipeline step.""" 75→ error_type: str 84→LandStep = Callable[[ErkContext, LandState], LandState | LandError] 92→def resolve_target(ctx: ErkContext, state: LandState) -> LandState | LandError: 128→ return LandError( 130→ error_type="invalid_target", 145→) -> LandState | LandError: 187→ validation_error = validate_parent_is_trunk( 193→ validation_error is None, 194→ validation_error.message if validation_error else "", 225→) -> LandState | LandError: 230→ return LandError( 232→ error_type="up_with_pr", 268→) -> LandState | LandError: 294→def validate_pr(ctx: ErkContext, state: LandState) -> LandState | LandError: 307→ return LandError( 309→ error_type="no_pr_details", 341→def resolve_pr_id(ctx: ErkContext, state: LandState) -> LandState | LandError: 354→def gather_confirmations(ctx: ErkContext, state: LandState) -> LandState | LandError: 383→def resolve_objective(ctx: ErkContext, state: LandState) -> LandState | LandError: 399→def merge_pr(ctx: ErkContext, state: LandState) -> LandState | LandError: 406→ if isinstance(result, LandPrError): 407→ return LandError( 409→ error_type="graphite_merge_failed", 430→ if isinstance(merge_result, MergeError): 431→ return LandError( 433→ error_type="github_merge_failed", 434→ message=f"Failed to merge PR #{state.pr_number}\n\n{merge_result.message}", 443→def create_learn_pr(ctx: ErkContext, state: LandState) -> LandState | LandError: 454→def cleanup_and_navigate(ctx: ErkContext, state: LandState) -> LandState | LandError: 506→def run_validation_pipeline(ctx: ErkContext, state: LandState) -> LandState | LandError: 507→ """Run the validation pipeline, returning final state or first error.""" 510→ if isinstance(result, LandError): 516→def run_execution_pipeline(ctx: ErkContext, state: LandState) -> LandState | LandError: 517→ """Run the execution pipeline, returning final state or first error.""" 520→ if isinstance(result, LandError):
